notes: Source: data/history/source-screenshots/financial/2024.png.
The screenshot uses placement-based columns plus Champ Ring and a header labeled Rollover to 2023.
Weekly payout totals are visible but are not included in the Amount Won column for this season.
Mike E has $50 in the 3rd Place column but $0 in Amount Won; that value is preserved in manager notes and not treated as a paid award.
Mike M has Amount Won of $205 while all visible placement and Champ Ring columns in that row show $0; the value is captured as an other award.
The footer shows Weekly Payout $140, Champ Ring $18, 4th Place $25, 3rd Place $50, 2nd Place $100, 1st Place $267, Amount Won $615, Entry Fee Paid $600, Rollover to 2023 $0, and Total Earned $15.
newOwnerFee and futureDeposit are null because the screenshot does not label any amount as a new-owner fee or future deposit; rollover values are captured in notes only.
regularSeasonWeeks and actualRingCost are null because they are not shown.
